productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men White Casual Shoes
description: An absolutely cool casual shoe, this pair from numero uno is a great addition to your wardrobe. The all white uppers with grey and black accents in a classic silhouette creates a strong impression. Team this with jeans and t-shirts for great urban style.UpperSynthetic leather upper for durability and comfortPerforated sides for greater breathabilitySynthetic panel overlays in a glossy finish on the heel for added styleLace-ups for a snug FitCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for added comfortBrand name printed on the side, on the tongue and behind collarMidsoleEVA midsole for better shock absorption and all day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole in interwoven pattern for maximum durability and tractionShoe careWipe synthetic leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
